title: Press & Awards
subtitle: What the critics and industry leaders are saying about The Meridian.

items.headline: The Meridian Brings Seasonal Sophistication to the Upper West Side
items.excerpt: Chef Marcus Bellamy's thoughtful approach to seasonal cooking makes The Meridian a neighborhood gem worth crossing town for.

items.headline: Best Chef: New York City — Nominee
Award of Excellence
items.excerpt: The Meridian's 350+ label wine list demonstrates a deep commitment to quality, diversity, and sustainable viticulture.

items.headline: The Meridian Is the Upper West Side's Best-Kept Secret
items.excerpt: With a killer cocktail program and seasonally obsessed kitchen, this is a restaurant firing on all cylinders.

items.headline: 50 Best Restaurants in NYC 2025
items.excerpt: The Meridian earns its spot with impeccable service, a thoughtful wine program, and a menu that changes just often enough to keep regulars excited.
